name: datahub-context-compass
description: Metadata risk brief generator for DataHub-style context snapshots.

scripts.check: node --check src/analyze.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/exportMcpPlan.js && node --check src/mcpPlan.js && node --check src/renderSite.js && node --check test/analyze.test.js && node --check test/mcpPlan.test.js
scripts.build: node src/cli.js examples/metadata-snapshot.json reports/sample-risk-brief.md reports/sample-risk-brief.json && node src/exportMcpPlan.js examples/metadata-snapshot.json reports/datahub-mcp-read-plan.md reports/datahub-mcp-read-plan.json && node src/renderSite.js reports/sample-risk-brief.json public/index.html
